headline: A Look At Citigroup (C) Valuation As Shares Deliver Strong Recent Returns
summary: Citigroup (C) is back in focus after recent trading, giving investors fresh data to weigh alongside its long track record as a global bank and its current share price of US$125.90. See our latest analysis for Citigroup. At a share price of US$125.90, Citigroup has delivered a 6.1% year to date share price return. The 1 year total shareholder return of 70.9%, along with a 3 year total shareholder return of about 3x, highlight strong momentum following a softer 1 month share price return. If...

headline: Here’s What Citi Thinks About Grupo Aeroportuario del Centro Norte (OMAB)
summary: Grupo Aeroportuario del Centro Norte, S.A.B. de C.V. (NASDAQ:OMAB) is one of the Best Airport Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. On May 8, Citi upgraded Grupo Aeroportuario del Centro Norte, S.A.B. de C.V. (NASDAQ:OMAB) from Neutral to Buy and kept the price target unchanged at MXN 270. The firm noted that the stock […]
